description: SQL Injection in GET /tasks/:id/user — req.params.id directly concatenated into query string passed to better-sqlite3 prepare()
Path Traversal in GET /tasks/attachment — req.query.filename concatenated with './uploads/' prefix without sanitization, allowing directory traversal
Command Injection in POST /tasks/convert — req.body.filename passed to exec() shell command without sanitization
Reflected XSS in GET /tasks/search — req.query.q interpolated directly into HTML response template without encoding
Open Redirect in GET /users/redirect — req.query.returnUrl passed directly to res.redirect() without URL validation
Hardcoded JWT secret — SECRET constant assigned literal string 'jwt-secret-abc123xyz' committed to source code
